{{Infobox location
| name = Rosegold continent
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Rosegold continent Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Rosegold]] continent is a major landmass that serves as the central hub of human power. It is characterized by diverse geography, including rolling hills, western plains, and mountainous regions with rocky terrain. Historically, the continent was largely ruled by [[House Arelius]], led by the former [[Monarch Tiberian Arelius]], who once controlled half of its territory before his death eight years ago. Currently, the continent is under the rule of [[Reigan Shen]], [[the Emperor]] of Lions and [[Monarch]] of [[Rosegold]], who rose to power by uniting various factions and creating his own [[Path]]. [[Reigan Shen]]'s influence is significant enough that he is considered a peer to other major [[Monarchs]], though his territory faces potential threats from approaching forces. The continent is also home to various powerful bloodlines and [[sacred beasts]], such as the white lions of the western plains. Legends associated with [[Rosegold]] speak of a mythical buried city that holds all sacred art secrets, offering infinite insight and power to those who discover it; this legend is so pervasive that seeking easy advancement is colloquially referred to as "Seeking [[Arelia]]."}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Rosegold]] continent is the ancestral domain of [[House Arelius]], which formerly held rule over much of the territory. Currently, the continent is governed by [[Emperor]] [[Reigan Shen]]. Within these lands lie the western plains, which serve as the birthplace of [[the Emperor]]'s pride.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[House Arelius]] is on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Rosegold continent]] is ruled by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is [[the Emperor]] of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Rosegold continent]] has western plains where [[Reigan Shen]]'s pride was born.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[House Arelius]] used to rule over most of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]] was born on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Rosegold continent]] is ruled by a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Tiberian Arelius]] was the fallen ruler over half of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]]'s subordinates are traveling to the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rosegold continent]] is suspected to belong to [[House Shen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Rosegold continent]] contains a distant branch of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Rosegold continent]] is the center of human power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
